response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical leadership, extensive full-stack development experience, and direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. His background at Google and Meta, along with open-source contributions, aligns well with the Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role, though his experience in production-grade GenAI solutions is partially inferred rather than explicitly detailed.
strengths: Proven technical leadership at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with experience in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development.
Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (DLang), and cloud platforms, including AWS and Kubernetes.
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship, demonstrating a commitment to engineering excellence and knowledge sharing.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, with GenAI experience inferred from recent Google role.
No direct evidence of designing or optimizing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures or vector databases in the resume.
Limited detail on stakeholder-facing technical discovery sessions or enterprise-scale AI system deployments.
